Class Inventory

java.lang.Object
Inventory
public class Inventory extends Object
Initializes object representing Inventory table in the database

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    List<StockItem>
    activeInventory
    List holding only items with the active status
    List<StockItem>
    inventory
    List of all inventory items

    Constructor
    Description
    Inventory(Connection connection)
    Initializes the object through a database connection

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createItem(Connection connection, String itemName, int stockQuantity, String status)
    Creates a new row entry in the Inventory table in the database.
    void
    deleteItem(Connection connection, int stockItemId)
    Deletes an item, not reccomended expept to reduce clutter of items never used previously
    StockItem
    getItem(int stockItemId)
    From the entire table element, retrieve a specific item's data object
    String
    printAllItems()
    Returns a list of all inventory items as a formatted string.
    void
    updateActiveItems(int stockItemId, boolean active)
    Updates only locally, the list of items considered active
    void

    Updates the item name of the item with the related input id
    void
    updateStatus(Connection connection, int stockItemId, boolean active)
    Updates an item's status within the database table Inventory
    void

    Updates the quantity of the item in the database

  • Field Details

    • inventory

      public List<StockItem> inventory
      List of all inventory items

    • activeInventory

      public List<StockItem> activeInventory
      List holding only items with the active status

  • Constructor Details

    • Inventory

      public Inventory(Connection connection)
      Initializes the object through a database connection

      Primarily a List of StockItem objects

      Parameters:
      connection - SQL database connection object

  • Method Details

    • getItem

      public StockItem getItem(int stockItemId)
      From the entire table element, retrieve a specific item's data object
      Parameters:
      stockItemId - Unique identifier of item to be retrrieved
      Returns:
      StockItem object holding item data

    • printAllItems

      public String printAllItems()
      Returns a list of all inventory items as a formatted string. Used only for debugging.
      Returns:

    • createItem

      public void createItem(Connection connection, String itemName, int stockQuantity, String status)
      Creates a new row entry in the Inventory table in the database.
      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection
      itemName - Name of the new item to be inserted
      stockQuantity - Initial Quantity of the new stock item introduced
      status - Status of the item to be created

    • deleteItem

      public void deleteItem(Connection connection, int stockItemId)
      Deletes an item, not reccomended expept to reduce clutter of items never used previously

    • updateItemName

      public void updateItemName(Connection connection, int stockItemId, String itemName)
      Updates the item name of the item with the related input id
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection object
      stockItemId - Unique id of the item to be updated
      itemName - New name after the item update

    • updateStockQuantity

      public void updateStockQuantity(Connection connection, int stockItemId, int stockQuantity)
      Updates the quantity of the item in the database
      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection object
      stockItemId - Unique id of the item to be updated
      stockQuantity - Quantity of the object after the update

    • updateActiveItems

      public void updateActiveItems(int stockItemId, boolean active)
      Updates only locally, the list of items considered active
      Parameters:
      stockItemId - Umique id of the item to be updated
      active - Status of the item after the update

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(Connection connection, int stockItemId, boolean active)
      Updates an item's status within the database table Inventory
      Parameters:
      connection - Datbase Connection
      stockItemId - Unique id of the item to be updated
      active - True to change to Active, False to change to Inactive
